zh.lifeSummary: 當Joanna de Govis於1285年出生在法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利阿爾可-拉-巴塔爾時，她的父親Lord William of Gouvis57歲，母親Petronilla52歲。她和John de Latimer至少有4個兒子。她去世於1346年5月1日在英國諾薩普頓史爾可比享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joanna de Govis于1285年出生在法国豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利阿爾可-拉-巴塔爾时，她的父亲Lord William of Gouvis57岁，母亲Petronilla52岁。她和John de Latimer至少有4个儿子。她去世于1346年5月1日在英国諾薩普頓史爾可比享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Govis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Hovious
meanings: Americanized form of Dutch Hovius: Latinized form of Hof , Van Hove or Ten Hove, a topographic name meaning ‘at the (manor) farm’.

nameMeanings.name: Joanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form, Io(h)anna, of Greek Iōanna, the feminine equivalent of Iōannēs ( see John ). In the New Testament, this name is borne by a woman who was one of Jesus's followers (Luke 8:3; 24:10). She was the wife of the steward of the household of King Herod Antipas. The name was regularly used throughout the Middle Ages in most parts of Europe as a feminine equivalent of John , but in England it has only been in common use as a vernacular given name since the 19th century. Celebrated British bearers of the name include the novelist Joanna Trollope ( b. 1943 ), the actress Joanna Lumley ( b. 1946 ), and the concert pianist Joanna McGregor ( b. 1959 ).

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Joanna de Govis was born in 1285, in Arques-la-Bataille, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France, her father, Lord William of Gouvis, was 57 and her mother, Petronilla, was 52. She had at least 4 sons with John de Latimer. She died on 1 May 1346, in Corby, Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joanna de Govis est née en 1285, à Arques-la-Bataille, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, France, son père, Lord William of Gouvis, avait 57 ans et sa mère, Petronilla, avait 52 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils avec John de Latimer. Elle est décédée le 1 mai 1346, à Corby, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joanna de Govis 1285 in Arques-la-Bataille, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Lord William of Gouvis 57 und ihre Mutter Petronilla 52. Sie hatte mit John de Latimer mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb am 1. Mai 1346 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Corby, Northamptonshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joanna de Govis è nata il nel 1285 nel Arques-la-Bataille, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Lord William of Gouvis, aveva 57 anni e sua madre, Petronilla, aveva 52 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli con John de Latimer. Morì il 1 maggio 1346, nel Corby, Northamptonshire, England, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joanna de Govisが1285年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメアルクエス-ラ-バティイルで生まれた時，父Lord William of Gouvisは57歳，母Petronillaは52歳であった。彼女はJohn de Latimerとの間に少なくとも4人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1346年5月1日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアコルビーで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joanna de Govis(이)가 1285년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 세이인-마이팀 아크스-라-바테이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lord William of Gouvis(은)는 57세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Petronilla(은)는 52세였다. 그녀는 John de Latimer(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1346년 5월 1일 영국 노르섬프토실르 코르비에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joanna de Govis nasceu em 1285, em Arques-la-Bataille, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, França, seu pai, Lord William of Gouvis, tinha 57 anos e sua mãe, Petronilla, tinha 52 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos com John de Latimer. Ela faleceu em 1 de maio de 1346, em Corby, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joanna de Govis родилась в 1285 г. в местности аркуес-ла-батеилл, сине-маритим, хауте-норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Lord William of Gouvis было 57 лет, а матери, которую звали Petronilla, 52. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына от John de Latimer. Она умерла 1 мая 1346 г. в местности корби, нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joanna de Govis nació en 1285, en Arques-la-Bataille, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Lord William of Gouvis, tenía 57 años y su mamá, Petronilla, tenía 52 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos con John de Latimer. Murió el 1 de mayo de 1346, en Corby, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 61 años.
